creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitri Goutnik from comment #5)

I don't know if this port offers anything considerably different than base, however I am thinking that base it will definitely be more secure.

The only other port is net/sfinger, and I am going to work on deprecating it as website is no longer available, and upstream code is no longer accessible and is pulling from distcache (local FreeBSD ports distribution code source cache).

I would be more inclined to including this in portstree with submitter working with upstream regarding security of this software.
